titleStmt.title: Versions of Act of Faith in Lushootseed
titleStmt.author: Dawn Bates and Deryle Lonsdale

availability.p: This information may not be reproduced without the explicit permission from the copyright holder. For copyright information, please contact Deryle Lonsdale at lonz@byu.edu

notesStmt.note: This has two Romanized versions and our updated orthography.

app.rdg: An act of faith
